mapper.sql: select activity_id, title, summary, cover_url, description, start_time, end_time, location, max_participants, status, publish_time, publish_user_id, publish_user_name, participant_count, del_flag, visible_post_ids, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from hx_activity
mapper.select:
del_flag = '0'
and title like concat('%', #{title}, '%')
and status = #{status}
and create_by like concat('%', #{createBy}, '%')
order by publish_time desc, create_time desc
where del_flag = '0' and status = '1' order by publish_time desc, create_time desc

where del_flag = '0'
and status in
#{status}
and status = '1'
and ( visible_post_ids is null or visible_post_ids = '' or
FIND_IN_SET(#{postId}, visible_post_ids) > 0
)
and (visible_post_ids is null or visible_post_ids = '')
order by publish_time desc, create_time desc
mapper.update:
update hx_activity
title = #{title}, summary = #{summary}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, description = #{description}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, location = #{location}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, status = #{status}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, publish_user_id = #{publishUserId}, publish_user_name = #{publishUserName}, participant_count = #{participantCount}, del_flag = #{delFlag},
visible_post_ids = #{visiblePostIds},
visible_post_ids = null,
update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark},
where activity_id = #{activityId}
update hx_activity set participant_count = ifnull(participant_count, 0) + 1 where activity_id = #{activityId} and del_flag = '0'
update hx_activity set participant_count = CASE WHEN ifnull(participant_count, 0) > 0 THEN participant_count - 1 ELSE 0 END where activity_id = #{activityId} and del_flag = '0'
update hx_activity set status = #{status}, update_time = sysdate() where activity_id = #{activityId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: update hx_activity set del_flag = '2', update_time = sysdate() where activity_id = #{activityId}
